entities.name: WATERSHED
entities.description: A hydrological unit and socio-political-ecological entity that determines food, social, and economical security and provides life support services

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL UNIT
entities.description: A unit of land drainage defined by the flow of water

entities.name: SOCIO-POLITICAL-ECOLOGICAL ENTITY
entities.description: An entity that integrates social, political, and ecological dimensions

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food

entities.name: SOCIAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having social protections and stability within a community

entities.name: ECONOMICAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having stable financial resources to support a standard of living

entities.name: LIFE SUPPORT SERVICES
entities.description: Essential environmental services that sustain human life

entities.name: RURAL PEOPLE
entities.description: Human populations residing in rural areas

entities.name: WATERSHED SIZE
entities.description: The physical area or scale of a watershed

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT OBJECTIVES
entities.description: The specific goals intended for the development of a region

entities.name: TERRAIN SLOPE
entities.description: The gradient or incline of the land surface

entities.name: FOREST DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of establishing or expanding forest cover

entities.name: PASTURE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of establishing or improving land for livestock grazing

entities.name: HILLY AREAS
entities.description: Geographical regions characterized by hills and steep terrain

entities.name: INTENSIVE AGRICULTURE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Agricultural systems characterized by high inputs to maximize productivity
